name: Basic Best Salmon Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon, reserving 2 tablespoons of liquid.
2. Combine the flaked salmon and reserved liquid with the remaining ingredients.
3. Place the mixture in a well-greased loaf pan (8 ½ x 4 ½ x 2 ½ inches) or shape it into a loaf on a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
Nutrients Per Serving:
Calories: 268
Fat-Total: 8.12 g
Protein: 21.4 g
Cholesterol: 114 mg
Carbohydrates: 26.1 g
Sodium: 677 mg
Dietary Fiber: 1.58 g
